1.3 

September 2021 K. Schneider 
A. Meyer • Added new field, PRSN_CLM_IND, adjusted definition, and 
values for SUBMTG_STATE_CD and CLM_TYPE_CD 
• Added new valid values for XIX_SRVC_CTGRY_CD XXI and 
SRVC_CTGRY_CD 
• Added new valid values related to COVID-19: PGM_TYPE_CD, 
BNFT_TYPE_CD, and TOS_CD 
 1.2 

August 2020 K. Schneider • Updated for the 2017–2018 data release 
• Added valid values to IP_SUD_TXNMY_IND, NDC_UOM_CD, 
SUD_TXNMY_IND, TOS_CD, WVR_TYPE_CD, and 
XXI_SRVC_CTGRY_CD
